query:
SELECT edp.userId, u.name, u.username, edp.businessDate, edp.totalPoints, edp.finalKpiScore
FROM engineer_daily_productivity edp
JOIN users u ON u.id = edp.userId
WHERE edp.userId IN (750189, 1)
  AND edp.businessDate = CURDATE()
ORDER BY edp.userId ASC;

SELECT psd.userId, u.name, u.username, COUNT(*) AS detailRows, ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(psd.earnedPoints), 0), 4) AS totalPoints
FROM productivity_score_details psd
JOIN users u ON u.id = psd.userId
WHERE psd.stationCode = 'D'
  AND psd.businessDate = CURDATE()
GROUP BY psd.userId, u.name, u.username
ORDER BY psd.userId ASC;
